notes: Filter changed, furnace running clean. Good for Sunday.
Coffee at 7 with Dale. Black, like always.
Told Karen I'm fine. She worries anyway.
Tomatoes and cucumbers this year, same as Marlene did.
Chairs and sound set for the memorial service Saturday.
Picked up the lisinopril refill at the pharmacy.
Snow tonight. I'll salt the steps before service.
Truck's due for an oil change at Bohl's next week.
